title: it-sa 2023

fields.heading: it-sa 2023
fields.subheading: it-sa Expo&Congress - Europe's leading trade fair for IT security from 10 - 12 October 2023

textContent:
it-sa is Europe's largest trade fair for IT security and one of the world's most important platforms for solutions in the fields of cloud management, mobile and cybersecurity as well as data and network security.

Based in Nuremberg since 2009, it-sa is the meeting place for C-level experts, IT security officers from industry, the service sector and administration, as well as developers and providers of products and services relating to IT security and cybersecurity.

As the worldwide leader in Intelligent Identity and Access Security, BeyondTrust will be represented with an exhibition stand this year.

Visit us in Hall 7A at our booth 317.

Book an appointment with us here and receive a free ticket for this year´s it-sa 2023.

Don't miss our expert presentations as part of the it-sa forum program in Hall 7A in Forum E:

  • The Remote Access Challenge - Has VPN had its day? (in German)
    Tuesday, 10 October 2023 | 01:45-02:00 pm
  • Least Privilege - Effective reduction of the attack surface (in German)
    Wednesday, 11 October 2023 | 04:30-05:00 pm

    Thursday, 12 October 2023 | 11:15-11:30 am

title: BeyondTrust e Ping Identity: Entregando os principais componentes para uma estratégia Zero Trust eficaz

fields.heading: BeyondTrust e Ping Identity: Entregando os principais componentes para uma estratégia Zero Trust eficaz

fields.blockBody:
A BeyondTrust e Ping Identity se uniram para fornece segurança ainda mais robusta para as identidades, inclusive as privilegiadas, mantendo-as à frente das ameaças. Os ataques estão crescendo conforme os riscos aumentam a cada alteração em sistemas, instalação de novas aplicações e novas conexões na infraestrutura de TI.

Juntas, as plataformas BeyondTrust e Ping Identity oferecem uma melhor experiência do usuário, uma vez que é possível integrar facilmente vários fatores de autenticação e SSO com gestão de privilégios em uma estratégia eficaz de Zero Trust – para todo o seu ecossistema.

Convidamos você para um webinar no próximo dia 05 de setembro, às 16h (hora Brasília), onde você poderá compreender como funciona a integração entre as tecnologias e conhecer os benefícios que a parceria entre as empresas traz para seu negócio.

title: Securing Critical Infrastructure in an AI-Powered Era

fields.heading: Securing Critical Infrastructure in an AI-Powered Era

fields.blockBody: In an era driven by artificial intelligence (AI) and interconnected systems, safeguarding critical infrastructure has become more vital than ever. Join us for an insightful event where experts and policy makers gather to discuss the evolving landscape of critical infrastructure security and delve into the challenges and strategies associated with securing critical infrastructure in the face of emerging technologies.

• Cybersecurity in the Age of Rapid Digitalization: Risk and Opportunities in AI-Driven Information Security
    Presented by: Nathaniel Callens, Chief Information Security Officer, Grab
    As organizations embrace rapid digitalization and the adoption of generative AI across various sectors, including critical national services, it is crucial to understand the associated security risks and opportunities. Learn how organizations can stay ahead of security risks while leveraging the opportunities provided by AI-driven innovation.

  • Fortifying Your Cyber Hygiene: Strengthening Security Posture Against Privilege-based Attacks
    Presented by: Leon Tan, PAM Evangelist, BeyondTrust
    Learn about the critical aspect of cyber hygiene and explore strategies for organizations to bolster their security posture against privilege-based attacks, which have become a prime attack vector in the new era of AI innovation.

  • Securing Critical Infrastructure: Practices and Strategies
    Presented by: Christopher Anthony, Director, Critical Information Infrastructure Division, Cyber Security Agency of Singapore (CSA)
    Join us for a deep dive into the Cybersecurity Code-of-Practice issued by the Cyber Security Agency to secure Critical Information Infrastructure. Discover the practices and strategies to safeguard critical information infrastructure from potential cyber threats to deliver Essential Service.

fields.body: Watch our March Women in Security Networking Event

fields.blockBody:
Working in cybersecurity as a woman can be very difficult, let alone getting started in the field! Only 25% of women work in tech, and BiaSciLab is helping to change that. In this talk, 16 year old BiaSciLab will go over her own struggles getting started and why she started her nonprofit, Girls Who Hack. GWH is focused on giving the younger generation of girls a head start into cyber security without the pressure of being the “only girl in class”.

BiaSciLab will show how you can enter the industry at any age no matter your tech background. She will also provide free resources and advice you can implement even as a beginner.

Share this session with your kids, nieces/nephews, mentees, or anyone who you may think can benefit from this amazing talk! Hopefully they will become inspired and we can make 2023 a year for #GirlPower !!

Join the network! Sign up to receive our emails about sessions, exclusive invitations and latest news.

fields.heading: Join Us For An Exclusive Roundtable Event!

fields.blockBody:
Join us in Calgary at The Garret on Monday, September 18th for an intimate lunch where industry experts Morey Haber, BeyondTrust’s Chief Security Officer, and Jeff Rotberg, Tenable's Global Strategic Partners Director, will give the inside scoop on the IT and OT convergence, and managing security in OT environments, including closing the exposure gap.

OT organizations have fast-tracked their digital transformation with large-scale cloud adoption and technological integrations to take advantage of new operational efficiencies through IT-OT convergence, distributed workforce and remote access. This new interconnected OT landscape, in turn, has generated a slew of security risks. Cyberattacks targeting OT networks are sky-high. 93% of OT organizations experienced an intrusion incident in the past year, with 61% of intrusions impacting the OT environment.

To combat this threat, OT organizations are increasingly adopting intelligent ways to better estimate, understand and manage their exposure to proactively reduce overall cyber risk.

BeyondTrust and Tenable work together to enable all organizations to close their cybersecurity exposure gap with continuous threat detection, vulnerability management and highly secure remote access for IT, OT, Cloud, Container, Mobile, apps and more.

Join us in Calgary to learn more!

Join GoSecure and BeyondTrust experts for our upcoming Halifax Lunch and Learn!

During this event, we will discuss how the BeyondTrust platform will enable you to ensure privileges aren't left unchecked, preventing users from becoming entry points for attacks.

BeyondTrust's Privileged Access Management portfolio delivers identity-centric security that secures against both external and internal threats brought on by remote access. BeyondTrust PAM is designed to stand at the core of any zero trust strategy.

Remote Support empowers help desk teams to access and fix any remote device, on any platform, with a single solution quickly and securely. Consolidate and standardize help desk support with BeyondTrust to boost service desk productivity, efficiency, and security.

Businesses today must not only meet increasingly stringent company security policies, but are also subject to various industry compliance mandates. With BeyondTrust's Remote Support software, you're able to focus on solving user problems, not security concerns, to deliver best-in-class support experiences — without lapsing enterprise security postures or impacting business speeds.

Privileged Remote Access (PRA) controls, manages, and audits remote privileged access by authorized employees, contractors, and vendors. Enforce least privilege and exert granular control and visibility over remote while enabling user productivity.

PRA helps you meet key zero trust tenets and enable a Zero Trust Architecture by applying granular privileged access controls across the enterprise. This includes insider and third-party access. With a zero trust approach, ensure all access is appropriate, managed, and documented.

Interested in hearing more about how we can provide a solution to solve your information security challenges? Be sure to save your seat today to hear directly from our teams on how we can support you and your organization.

We hope to see you there!

fields.blockBody:
As a wave of digital transformation continues, increasing data and workloads are sitting in the cloud. While this has driven efficiencies for organizations it has also increased the attack surface. Customer and business partnerships can be irreparably damaged and trust lost if data and systems are breached, so effectively securing access to data and systems, regardless of where they reside is paramount.

In this paradigm, identity has become the new perimeter. Leveraging the approach of least privilege ensures that access to data and systems is only for the right people at the right time and for the correct length of time, reducing the potential attack surface.

Join us to learn more about the importance of digital trust in your transformation journey, and how you can build confidence in the integrity of your digital ecosystem by safeguarding your systems and data.

fields.blockBody:
Join our next user group led by the BeyondTrust University (BTU) Team. In this session you will network with industry peers, and, for the very first time, the BTU team is bringing a complimentary Password Safe specific workshop to a user group setting. Get a taste of what the BTU team has to offer and come ready to engage and leave empowered to get more value out of your solutions.

Learn what to expect below and register now to save your seat!

Password Safe (PS) Smart Rules are used to create Smart Groups allowing you to add Assets, Systems & Accounts into PS management. The Smart Rule filters you configure for the Smart Groups, determine the accounts that are added as Managed Accounts in Password Safe. Account based Smart Rules are 1 of 3 types along with Asset and Managed System based. We will onboard discovered accounts from previously scanned systems and accounts from a Directory by using a directory query nested within the Smart Rule.

In this session we will cover:

  • Introduction to Smart Rules
  • Types of Smart Rules
  • Onboard admin accounts from local systems
  • Directory Queries
  • Onboard shared admin accounts from a Directory

Learn more about BeyondTrust University offerings at beyondtrust.com/services/training
